summary: Complete testing of Admin Reviews Management System - All features working correctly. Backend APIs (CRUD for reviews, platform management) and Frontend UI (AdminReviews page, Homepage platform links) fully functional.
seed_data_creation: Test review created and deleted during testing. Test platform (Yelp) added and removed. Original Google Reviews platform preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Reviews Management System fully tested. All CRUD operations work. External platform links display correctly on homepage.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/reviews: ✓ Creates new review with user_name, rating, text, source

frontend_ui_tests.admin_sidebar_nav: ✓ 'Recensioner' nav item visible with MessageSquare icon [data-testid='nav-reviews']
frontend_ui_tests.review_form_fields: ✓ Form has: Kundnamn input, Betyg (star selector), Recensionstext textarea, Källa dropdown
frontend_ui_tests.create_review: ✓ Creating review shows toast 'Recension skapad' and adds to list
frontend_ui_tests.edit_review: ✓ Pencil icon opens edit form with pre-filled data, saves with 'Recension uppdaterad' toast
frontend_ui_tests.delete_review: ✓ Trash icon with confirmation deletes review, shows 'Recension raderad' toast
frontend_ui_tests.platform_form_fields: ✓ Form has: Plattform dropdown, Visningsnamn input, URL input
frontend_ui_tests.homepage_review_cards: ✓ Review cards show star ratings and source badges for non-manual reviews

verified_features.admin_reviews_crud: ✓ Full CRUD operations for reviews via admin panel
verified_features.homepage_integration: ✓ Platform links and review cards display correctly on homepage
verified_features.source_badges: ✓ Reviews with source (google, facebook, etc.) show badge, manual reviews don't
verified_features.star_ratings: ✓ Star selector in form, star display in review cards
